question_text: Let a linear model 𝑌= 𝛽଴+ 𝛽ଵ𝑋+ 𝜖 be fitted to the following data, where 𝜖 is normally distributed with mean 0 and unknown variance 𝜎ଶ> 0. Let 𝑌෠଴ denote the ordinary least-square estimator of 𝑌 at 𝑋= 6, and the variance of of 𝑌෠଴= 𝑐𝜎ଶ. Then the value of the real constant 𝑐 (rounded off to one decimal place) is equal to ______
